Notice Of New Hearing Date Re Defendant Blue Bus Tours Company Llcs Motion To Compel
Off Calendar Aug-07-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Alexandra Shipman, Esq. 619-234-2833 of Turley & Mara Law Firm for Plaintiff Ayra Koshravi.
April Glatt, Esq. 650-573-9500of Chauvel & Glatt for Defendant BLUE BUS TOURS COMPANY LLC.
Court reporter: David Disbrow, CSR #7768, 415-298-1538, david415d@yahoo.com, Reported.

All parties stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT BLUE BUS TOURS COMPANY LLC's Motion To Compel Discovery From Plaintiff Arya Khosravi.

The motion to Compel is Granted in part and Denied in part. Moving party to reform request for production categories to conform with Court rulings. Request for sanctions is Taken Under Submission. Moving party to prepare order for Plaintiff's review. The Court has agreed to an in-camera review of private documents. Court to execute previously stipulated order.*

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: David Disbrow, CSR #7768, 415-298-1538, david415d@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/JPT)
